packageRules.description: Dev tooling minor/patch in its own group so automerge can fire — grouping them with production deps (group:allNonMajor) made every PR contain non-automergeable deps, so automerge never triggered. NOTE: automerge is only safe once branch protection marks the CI workflow as a required status check (owner action) — until then Renovate merges on 'no failing checks', which passes even if CI never ran.
Production deps ship to users — always reviewed by a human, never automerged, even for patches.
